case_title: MCKESSON EMPLOYEES' FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS CALONSAG, LUCIA C/O MCKESSON CORP.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALONSAG, LUCIA C/O MCKESSON CORP.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,463.77 FILED BY MCKESSON EMPLOYEES' FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT CALONSAG, LUCIA C/O MCKESSON CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCKESSON EMPLOYEES' FEDERAL CREDIT UNION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALONSAG, LUCIA C/O MCKESSON CORP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
